//: Template for the Agent 365 CLI (a365) configuration file.
//preview: Microsoft Agent 365 is in PREVIEW. Fields may change between CLI versions. Run 'a365 setup all -h' to confirm the current schema.
//usage: 01-Select-AzureContext.ps1 fills tenantId/subscriptionId/resourceGroup and derives the display names, then writes a365.config.json.
//deploymentProjectPath: Path to the agent project that gets deployed to Azure App Service.
//authMode: obo = delegated (default, no admin role) | s2s = app permissions | both
//messagingEndpoint: HTTPS URL where the deployed agent receives messages. Known only AFTER first deploy; register later with 'a365 setup blueprint --endpoint-only'.
